---
title: "Explainable AI for Edema Etiology: Reproducible Analysis Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("../analysis_r/00_config.R")
library(data.table)
library(knitr)
```

# Data sources

This analysis uses MIMIC-IV v2.2 and eICU-CRD v2.0 from PhysioNet under credentialed access and data use agreements. Raw patient-level data are not redistributed.

# Cohort construction

```{r cohort}
paths <- file.path(DIR_TABLES, c("mimic_label_distribution.csv", "eicu_label_distribution.csv"))
for (p in paths[file.exists(paths)]) {
  cat("\n\n##", basename(p), "\n")
  print(kable(fread(p)))
}
```

# Model performance

```{r perf}
p <- file.path(DIR_TABLES, "table3_model_performance_mimic_internal_test.csv")
if (file.exists(p)) kable(fread(p), digits = 3)
```

# Figures

## Figure 1. Five-class confusion matrix

```{r fig1, out.width='90%'}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(DIR_FIGURES, "figure1_confusion_matrix.png"))
```

## Figure 2. One-vs-rest ROC curves

```{r fig2, out.width='90%'}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(DIR_FIGURES, "figure2_roc.png"))
```

## Figure 3. SHAP global feature importance

```{r fig3, out.width='90%'}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(DIR_FIGURES, "figure3_shap_global_importance.png"))
```

# Interpretation

The final interpretation must be written only after the real server run completes. This template intentionally does not invent findings before the real outputs exist.

# Reproducibility notes

All figures and tables in this report are generated from the saved prediction tables under `output/tables/` and the model object under `output/models/`.
